title: Neviti Rocking Rudolf Scratch Trivia, Multi-Colour, Pack of 10
features: Each card features 3 multiple choice questions
They can be co-ordinated with the full ‘Rocking Rudolf’ range or used alone
description: Product Description Have fun this Christmas with our ‘Rocking Rudolf’ scratch trivia cards. An original addition to your party table, these cards feature our distinctive reindeer character and fun questions, suitable for all ages. Each card features three multiple choice questions, a great way to stimulate conversation and interaction amongst your guests, both young and old. Box Contains 10 x trivia
